title: inula macrolepis
intro: Inula macrolepis, also known as the large-leaved inula, is a perennial herb in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Inula macrolepis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant protection. Inula macrolepis can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and it is also used in some traditional remedies as a topical treatment for wounds and skin conditions.
